name: Raito Kogyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Raito Kogyo Co., Ltd. engages in the civil engineering contract works in Japan and internationally. It is involved in civil engineering works related to slope protection and landslide prevention, foundation and ground improvement, pile and diaphragm wall, structural repair and reinforcement, environmental restoration, and sewage system, building, and civil engineering construction, as well as other projects. In addition, the company trades in construction material and equipment, and office equipment; and sells and leases vehicles, and office, construction, and homecare equipment. Further, it operates care houses; and provides temporary staffing, elderly care, and life and non-life insurance agency services. The company was formerly known as Raito Bosui Kogyosho Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Raito Kogyo Co., Ltd. in 1951. Raito Kogyo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1943 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
